name: php8.4-mysql
title: php8.4-mysql
description:
MySQL module for PHP
This package provides the MySQL module(s) for PHP.
.
PHP (recursive acronym for PHP: Hypertext Preprocessor) is a widely-used
open source general-purpose scripting language that is especially suited
for web development and can be embedded into HTML.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use php8.4-mysql because MySQL module for PHP.
When the engagement is in the install phase, use php8.4-mysql as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair php8.4-mysql with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `php8.4-mysql --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
